source_jobs.title: VP of Technology
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT ANDO

Ando is building AI-native workforce infrastructure for the 80M hourly workers in the U.S. and hundreds of millions globally.

Labor is the last broken supply chain. Forecasting, allocation, and professional identity remain fragmented across static tools and manual decision-making. Ando is rebuilding this system from first principles.

We start with highly accurate AI-generated demand forecasts, move to allocation-first labor optimization, and compound value through a persistent labor graph that captures skills, reliability, availability, and performance across time and employers. Over time, this becomes a professional identity layer and intelligent system serving both enterprises and frontline workers.

Ando is a Seed-stage company backed by Slow Ventures and experienced operators. We are live with real customers and entering a phase where architectural clarity, learning loops, and AI systems quality are foundational to long-term success.




DUE TO THE VOLUME OF INBOUND OUTREACH, WE ARE UNABLE TO REVIEW DIRECT EMAILS OR MESSAGES REGARDING THIS ROLE. PLEASE DO NOT CONTACT ANDO EMPLOYEES OR LEADERSHIP DIRECTLY, AS THOSE INQUIRIES WILL BE DELETED WITHOUT REVIEW. ALL APPLICATIONS MUST BE SUBMITTED THROUGH THE OFFICIAL POSTING TO BE CONSIDERED.




AI / ML / DATA SYSTEMS

 - Serve as Ando's AI/ML visionary — own the point of view and strategy for how forecasting, optimization, and labor intelligence create durable, defensible advantage, and direct the teams that build it

 - Direct the applied ML & data platform end-to-end — ingestion, normalization, feature systems, evaluation/monitoring, experimentation, and operational analytics — setting the standards, architecture, and measurement loops the ML/data teams execute against

 - Own and design an AI-native product architecture (including agentic workflows) with human-in-the-loop, auditability, safety guardrails, and rollback plans while making the principled calls and ensuring teams implement them well


TECHNICAL LEADERSHIP / ENGINEERING

 - Oversee all engineering and product-engineering functions including Product Management, Architecture, Core Systems, Frontend, Backend, Data, ML/AI

 - Set the technical vision and turn it into an executable roadmap; make principled architecture decisions while shipping continuously

 - Build an engineering operating system that scales: planning, reviews, quality gates, release practices, and platform standards that increase throughput and correctness

 - Raise the bar on reliability, security, and privacy for enterprise scale: observability, incident response, SLOs, data governance, and security posture


LEADERSHIP / TEAM BUILDING

 - Recruit, develop and lead a high-performing org across ML/AI, backend, frontend, data, infra, and Product; build a culture of ownership, speed, and high standards

 - Lead through ambiguity with crisp communication; create alignment via strong writing, decision logs, and predictable cross-functional cadences


STRATEGY / EXECUTIVE PARTNERSHIP

 - Be the CEO’s partner on strategy and platform bets; translate strategy into technical priorities, sequencing, and resourcing with clear tradeoffs

 - Represent Ando externally — to investors, the board, customers, and the tech community/ecosystem — as the company's senior technical voice

 - Stay close to customers and the market to shape what gets built; engage enterprise stakeholders to earn trust and reflect real operational constraints
   
   

Location: San Francisco–based candidates who can work hybrid from our San Francisco office beginning early 2027 are preferred. A long-term willingness to be based in San Francisco is a important, as Ando's Leadership Team will be centered in San Francisco as the company scales.




CULTURE AT ANDO

Ando is a high-trust, high-care organization built on ownership, respect, and thoughtful collaboration.

We value diverse perspectives, clear communication, and personal accountability. We move fast through alignment

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT ANDO

Ando is building AI-native workforce infrastructure for the 80M hourly workers in the U.S. and hundreds of millions globally.

Labor is the last broken supply chain. Forecasting, allocation, and professional identity remain fragmented across static tools and manual decision-making. Ando is rebuilding this system from first principles.

We start with highly accurate AI-generated demand forecasts, move to allocation-first labor optimization, and compound value through a persistent labor graph that captures skills, reliability, availability, and performance across time and employers. Over time, this becomes a professional identity layer and intelligent system serving both enterprises and frontline workers.

Ando is a Seed-stage company backed by Slow Ventures and experienced operators. We are live with real customers and entering a phase where architectural clarity, learning loops, and AI systems quality are foundational to long-term success.




DUE TO THE VOLUME OF INBOUND OUTREACH, WE ARE UNABLE TO REVIEW DIRECT EMAILS OR MESSAGES REGARDING THIS ROLE. PLEASE DO NOT CONTACT ANDO EMPLOYEES OR LEADERSHIP DIRECTLY, AS THOSE INQUIRIES WILL BE DELETED WITHOUT REVIEW. ALL APPLICATIONS MUST BE SUBMITTED THROUGH THE OFFICIAL POSTING TO BE CONSIDERED.



Product Vision & Strategy

 - Own the product roadmap across Ando's full surface — enterprise, employee, AI, labor intelligence, and workforce experiences — and help shape overall product strategy in close partnership with the leadership team

 - Translate Ando's product vision into clear priorities, roadmap sequencing, and measurable outcomes across the product

 - Balance immediate customer needs with long-term platform differentiation while ensuring products remain intuitive, AI-native, and operationally valuable

Customer Experience & Workflow Design

 - Partner directly with customers to deeply understand operational pain points, workflow complexity, and adoption blockers — maintaining regular customer touch points (weekly calls, onsite visits, etc) and owning the translation of those insights into prioritized discovery and experiments, not just learning

 - Design operator and employee workflows that reduce friction and build trust in AI-assisted experiences, with clear explainability, override controls, and auditability

AI Product & Labor Intelligence

 - Partner closely with Engineering and AI leadership to translate forecasting, optimization, and workforce intelligence into usable customer experiences — owning the full model-to-product path and accountable for end-to-end delivery, from input/data quality and model behavior through UX and measurable impact, not just translation

 - Define how AI-driven recommendations and labor intelligence surface in ways that are explainable, actionable, and valuable to frontline teams

Product Execution & Delivery

 - Drive disciplined execution across the product — specs, prioritization, reviews, shipping cadence — establishing operating rhythms that create speed without sacrificing long-term architecture

 - Partner cross-functionally with Engineering, Operations, Customer Success, and GTM to deliver high-impact product improvements

 - Own prioritization across the roadmap — balancing customer urgency, scalability, revenue impact, and differentiation — with documented tradeoffs and clear decision rights within product

Cross-Functional Collaboration

 - Work closely with the CEO and leadership team to align Engineering, Operations, CS, and GTM around product priorities

 - Set the standard for product craft as Ando's first dedicated PM, with the opportunity to shape how the product function grows over time

 - Communicate Ando's product direction and decisions to internal stakeholders and strategic customers with technical depth and strong product judgment

 


REQUIREMENTS

What you bring (Required)

 - 6-7+ years in product management, including time at seed / Series A / early-growth startups; comfortable being scrappy in a

source_jobs.title: Account Executive - Restaurants
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT ANDO

Ando is building AI-native workforce infrastructure for the 80M hourly workers in the U.S. and hundreds of millions globally.

Labor is the last broken supply chain. Forecasting, allocation, and professional identity remain fragmented across static tools and manual decision-making. Ando is rebuilding this system from first principles.

We start with highly accurate AI-generated demand forecasts, move to allocation-first labor optimization, and compound value through a persistent labor graph that captures skills, reliability, availability, and performance across time and employers. Over time, this becomes a professional identity layer and intelligent system serving both enterprises and frontline workers.

Ando is a Seed-stage company backed by Slow Ventures and experienced operators. We are live with real customers and entering a phase where architectural clarity, learning loops, and AI systems quality are foundational to long-term success.




CONTEXT

We are building our sales team to accelerate growth across restaurants in North America.

This is an early-stage role at a company with real traction and a clear path to scale. If you have sold into restaurants, understand the world of a GM or Ops Director, and want to help build something from the ground up, this role is for you.




THE ROLE

You will own the full sales cycle for restaurants in the 10 to 50 location range. That means finding them, qualifying them, running the demo, and closing them.

You will also help manage those accounts once they are live, making sure they get value quickly and stay engaged.




WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Run high-volume outbound to owner-operators and operations leaders at restaurant groups with 10 to 50 locations.

 - Lead demo calls that show prospects how Ando can help them forecast demand, improve staffing, and reduce schedule friction.

 - Close deals with urgency and ownership.

 - Manage pilots through paid conversion. Own the relationship from first call through renewal.

 - Work directly with the Head of Growth and leadership team on strategy, pipeline prioritization, and target accounts.

 - Bring customer feedback back to Product, Operations, and Customer Success so we keep building around real operator needs.




WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 - Five or more years in a closing sales role, ideally selling SaaS to restaurant operators.

 - Fluency in the restaurant world.

 - A genuine preference for outbound.

 - Strong demo instincts. You know how to show value fast and get a decision in the room.

 - Comfort with start-up culture. The playbook is being written, and you will help write it.

 - A competitive streak. You want to win, and you want the team to win.

 - Clear communication, strong follow-through, and the ability to keep a pipeline honest.




CULTURE AT ANDO

Ando is a high-trust, high-care organization built on ownership, respect, and thoughtful collaboration.

We value diverse perspectives, clear communication, and personal accountability. We move fast through alignment rather than force, operate comfortably in ambiguity, and build with empathy for the enterprises and workers our systems serve.

These values are core to how we work. Candidates who share them tend to thrive at Ando.




EQUAL EMPLOYMENT OPPORTUNITY, DEI & LEGAL NOTICE

Ando Technologies, Inc. is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, veteran status, or any other legally protected status.

And yes, we are proudly DEI. We believe diverse perspectives make teams stronger, systems smarter, and outcomes more equitable. Building infrastructure for the frontline workforce demands empathy, representation, and respect, and we take that responsibility seriously. Th

source_jobs.title: Executive Assistant to the Founder / CEO
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT ANDO

Ando is building AI-native workforce infrastructure for the 80M hourly workers in the U.S. and hundreds of millions globally.

Labor is the last broken supply chain. Forecasting, allocation, and professional identity remain fragmented across static tools and manual decision-making. Ando is rebuilding this system from first principles.

We start with highly accurate AI-generated demand forecasts, move to allocation-first labor optimization, and compound value through a persistent labor graph that captures skills, reliability, availability, and performance across time and employers. Over time, this becomes a professional identity layer and intelligent system serving both enterprises and frontline workers.

Ando is a Seed-stage company backed by Slow Ventures and experienced operators. We are live with real customers and entering a phase where architectural clarity, learning loops, and AI systems quality are foundational to long-term success.




THE ROLE

Ando is hiring an Executive Assistant to work directly alongside our Founder & CEO. This is the right-hand seat: a high-trust role for someone who wants to operate close to the center of an early-stage company and grow with it.

The core of the role is keeping the CEO operating at full capacity. You will manage his calendar, coordinate his travel, protect his time, and absorb the work that would otherwise slow him down. It is hands-on work, and doing it exceptionally well is what earns the trust the rest of the role is built on.

What sets this role apart is where it leads. As you establish yourself, you will partner with the leadership team on special projects and take on work in areas such as revenue operations and customer engagement. The right person is glad to handle the day-to-day and equally motivated to own more over time. For someone who wants to define their own path at a fast-growing company, there is considerable room to grow.

You will represent the CEO and the company in nearly everything you do, with the team, with customers, with investors, and beyond. That requires judgment, discretion, and a high degree of emotional intelligence.




WHAT YOU'LL OWN FROM DAY ONE

 - Calendar and scheduling. Own the CEO's calendar end to end. Weigh competing priorities, protect focus time, and keep each day running on schedule.

 - Meeting preparation and briefing. One of the most important parts of the role. Know who he is meeting before each conversation, including the individual, the company, and the relevant context and history, and brief him accordingly. Assemble what he needs going in, capture what matters coming out, and carry the follow-ups through to completion.

 - Protecting the CEO's time. Screen and prioritize what reaches him, prepare him for what is ahead, and ensure nothing important is missed. You will learn to anticipate needs and solve for them before the conflicts arise.

 - Taking work off his plate. Anticipate what is needed, resolve open items, and quietly handle the details that would otherwise accumulate.

 - Travel and logistics. Plan and manage all travel, anticipating the details before they become problems so he can arrive prepared and focused.

 - Personal coordination. This is not a personal-assistant role centered on errands. It does, however, require access to and awareness of the CEO's personal life and calendar so that everything stays aligned, making it one of the highest-trust aspects of the position.




WHERE THIS GROWS

As trust is established, the scope expands:

 - Partner with members of the leadership team on special projects.

 - Gain exposure to, and begin owning pieces of, revenue operations and customer-facing work.

 - Take on greater responsibility over time and shape the role around your strengths.




WHO YOU ARE

 - Roughly 2–3 years of professional experience. You have built strong organizational and communication instincts and are ready for a role with real trust and room to grow.

 - Trustworthy and discreet. Y

notes: AI-native workforce infrastructure startup with a focus on labor optimization and forecasting.
